home.headline: Where Can You Get
home.subtitle: A centralized guide for Filipinos who need a Guarantee Letter (GL) and financial assistance from PCSO, DSWD, and Malasakit Centers.
home.feat1Desc: Find out what documents you need based on your situation.
home.feat2Desc: Find the exact address of government branches and NGOs.
home.feat3Desc: View the nearest Malasakit Centers on a map.
home.feat4Desc: List of senators who provide medical Guarantee Letters.
home.glDesc: A Guarantee Letter (GL) is a formal letter from a government agency or official guaranteeing that they will pay part or all of your hospital bill or medicine. With the 2026 GAA "Anti-Epal" provisions, access to assistance directly in hospitals has been made easier.

step1.title: What is the patient's situation?
step1.subtitle: Choose the appropriate situation to know the required documents.
step1.outpatientSub: Just for a check-up or to get medicine

step2.title: What assistance do you need?
step2.subtitle: Choose the main reason you are requesting a Guarantee Letter.

step3.title: Required Documents
step3.checkInstruction: Check the box once you have the document.
step3.missingSub: Some important documents are not checked yet.
step3.noChannel: Choose where you will apply first

step4.title: Nearest Offices
step4.subtitle: Bring your complete documents to these offices.
step4.geoError: Could not get your location. Make sure GPS is on.
step4.geoUnsupported: Your browser does not support geolocation.
step4.emailDesc: If you cannot go in person, you can request medical assistance from Senators or Party-List online. The system will automatically include the documents you checked in the email template!

directory.title: Office Directory
directory.subtitle: Find the offices of PCSO, DSWD, and other agencies.
directory.searchPlaceholder: Search for an office or location...

footer.tagline: An initiative to make it easier for every Filipino to find medical assistance.
footer.disclaimerText: Information here may change without notice. Always contact your hospital's official social workers or visit the Malasakit Center for the official and latest process. We are not an official government agency.
